<TouchableOpacity
                    style={[
                      styles.buttonBottomSheet,
                      {
                        backgroundColor: isSelected.planning
                          ? colors.transparent
                          : colors.secondary,
                      },
                    ]}
                    onPress={() => handlSelect('planning')}>
                    <Text
                      style={[
                        styles.labelButton,
                        {
                          color: isSelected.planning
                            ? colors.secondary
                            : colors.background,
                        },
                      ]}>
                      {t('home.homeAppointment')}
                    </Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>

                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[
                      styles.buttonBottomSheet,
                      {
                        backgroundColor: isSelected.urgent
                          ? colors.transparent
                          : colors.secondary,
                      },
                    ]}
                    onPress={() => handlSelect('urgent')}>
                    <Text
                      style={[
                        styles.labelButton,
                        {
                          color: isSelected.urgent
                            ? colors.secondary
                            : colors.background,
                        },
                      ]}>
                      {t('home.homeCare')}
                    </Text>

this not the solution i want , when i selected one of the touchableopacity le second touchable take the oposit state if the isSelected.plannig is true and and the type is planning and the color is change  the isSelected.urgent take false  and is the isSelected.urgent is true isSelected.planning take false and the color change
name a commit of gitlab that discription this work

Here's a possible commit message that could describe this work:

```
feat: update button selection logic in HomeScreen component

Updated the button selection logic in the HomeScreen component to allow only one button to be selected at a time. When one button is selected, the other button will take the opposite state and its color will be updated accordingly. Refactored the code to use the useState hook to manage the component state and to use the TouchableOpacity component for the buttons with different background colors when selected or unselected.
``` 

Feel free to adjust the commit message as per your requirements.
